title: "Nothing Between My Soul and My Saviour" Acts 24:16

notes.introduction: An exposition of Acts 24:16 on Paul's stated goal of maintaining a conscience void of offense toward God and toward men, presented as the third message in a series on preparation for revival. The sermon draws on multiple New Testament and Old Testament passages to outline practical steps toward unobstructed fellowship with God.
themes: the temple of the holy spirit

sections.heading: Paul's Conscience Before the Sanhedrin and Felix
Second Practice: Prove What Is Acceptable
The Temple of God and Defilement
